assertions.description: Output references memory_manager.py as the CLI tool when memory intent
Output uses correct CLI commands (capture, load_context, session, stats)
Output references JSONL files for storage (errors.jsonl, sessions.jsonl)
Output does NOT suggest modifying evolution files directly (use CLI instead)
Output references the evolution docs directory path
Output references SQLite or memory.db for the persistent store
Output references hooks for automatic capture
Routing surface (SKILL.md main body) is concise — pushes detail to references/
Optimizer intent: output references frozen harness + fixed grading budget rule
Optimizer intent: references append-only experiments.tsv / keep|discard|crash decisions
Optimizer intent: cites Karpathy autoresearch single-mutable-artifact rule
GPUS site intent: cites cardinal rule (Lucide / SSG / getCollection / no layout-prop animation)
GPUS site intent: routes to commercial-first heuristic (copy / SEO / CTA / funnel) before perf
GPUS site intent: produces <answer> XML shape with baseline / experiment / validation / log_entry

test_cases.input: How do I capture a bug fix learning using the evolution-core system?
How do I load historical context at the start of a new session?
How does the evolution-core system automatically capture errors?
Full overview: explain evolution-core architecture (memory + optimizer + GPUS profile), storage, CLI, hooks, and integration with /evolve.
Run a Karpathy-style optimize loop over the `debugger` skill prompt. What scripts and rules apply?
Run an autoresearch experiment on the GPUS Astro site to improve the home hero CTA. What is the priority order and output shape?
